assertions.description: power_sequencing detects U1's EN2 pin connected to an unnamed floating net and generates a floating_en_warnings entry. The main schematic correctly aggregates 395 components across hierarchical sheets (power, data, asics, and four asic-3up-* instances), with 338 nets and correct power rail identification of GND, VDD, VIN, VIN_M. The USB-C Type-C connector J6 passes cc1/cc2 pulldown, D+/D- series resistor, and VBUS decoupling checks, only failing VBUS ESD protection.
